zh.Rotherfield, Wealden district, East Suss: 英國英格蘭素可洛瑟費爾德
zh.Turville, Buckinghamshire, England: 英國巴金哈姆爾圖維爾
zh.lifeSummary: Alice Samford於1501年出生在英國貝德福爾歐克麗。她於1521年與William Russell在英國素可洛瑟費爾德結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1609年3月在她的家鄉享年108歲，埋葬在英國貝德福爾歐克麗。

zh-hans.Turville, Buckinghamshire, England: 英国巴金哈姆爾圖維爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Alice Samford于1501年出生在英国貝德福爾歐克麗。她于1521年与William Russell在英国素可洛瑟費爾德结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1609年3月在她的家乡享年108岁，埋葬在英国貝德福爾歐克麗。

nameMeanings.name: Samford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Sandford
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places in England with names derived from Old English sand ‘sand’ + ford ‘ford, river crossing’, such as Sandford in Warcop (Westmorland), Sandford in Sonning and Dry Sandford in Abingdon (both Berkshire), Sandford on Thames and Sandford Saint Martin (both Oxfordshire), Great and Little Sampford (Essex), Sandford Orcas (Dorset), Sandford, Sampford Courtney, Sampford Peverell, and Sampford Spiney (all Devon), Sampford Arundel and Sampford Brett (both Somerset), and Sandford (Shropshire). See also Sandiford .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: Alice Samford was born in 1501, in Oakley, Bedfordshire, England. She married William Russell in 1521, in Rotherfield, Sussex, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. She died in March 1609, in her hometown, at the age of 108, and was buried in Oakley, Bedfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Alice Samford est née en 1501, à Oakley, Bedfordshire, Angleterre. Elle a épousé William Russell en 1521, à Rotherfield, Sussex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en mars 1609, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 108 ans, et a été enterrée à Oakley, Bedfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Alice Samford wurde 1501 in Oakley, Bedfordshire, England geboren. Sie hat 1521 in Rotherfield, Sussex, England William Russell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb im März 1609 im Alter von 108 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Oakley, Bedfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Alice Samford è nata il nel 1501 nel Oakley, Bedfordshire, England. Lei sposato William Russell nel 1521, nel Rotherfield, Sussex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel marzo 1609, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 108 anni, e fu sepolta a Oakley, Bedfordshire, England.

ja.Oakley, Bedfordshire, England: イギリスベドフォードシュアイアオアクリー
ja.lifeSummary: Alice Samfordは1501年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアオアクリーで生まれた。1521年にイギリススセックスロスエルフィールドでWilliam Russellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1609年3月に故郷で108歳で死去し，イギリスベドフォードシュアイアオアクリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Samford(은)는 1501년 영국 베드퍼드실르 클리에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1521년 영국 수세스 로더필드에서 William Russell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1609년 3월 그녀의 고향에서 108세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 베드퍼드실르 클리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Alice Samford nasceu em 1501, em Oakley, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com William Russell em 1521, em Rotherfield, Sussex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em março de 1609, em sua cidade natal, com 108 anos, e foi sepultada em Oakley, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Alice Samford родилась в 1501 г. в местности оакли, бедфордшир, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Russell в 1521 г. в местности ротирфиелд, суссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла марта 1609 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 108 лет и была похоронена в местности оакли, бедфордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Alice Samford nació en 1501, en Oakley, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra. Se casó con William Russell en 1521, en Rotherfield, Sussex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en marzo de 1609, en su pueblo, a la edad de 108 años, y fue sepultada en Oakley, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra.
